## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open the app and...
2. Click on...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen?

## What Actually Happened
What happened instead?

## Screenshots or Error Messages
If applicable, paste any error messages or attach screenshots.

## Your Setup
- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 14.5, Windows 11)
- **App version**: (shown in the title bar or About screen)
- **Scenario file**: (attach your `.xml` file if the bug is scenario-specific — remove any sensitive patient info first)

## Additional Context
Any other details that might help track this down.
